# Best AI Writing Tools for Grant Writing in 2026

Grant writing is competitive and time-consuming. AI tools help you write compelling proposals that stand out!

Check out our [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Grant Proposal Drafting

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps you draft grant proposals quickly with structured templates and persuasive language.

### Rytr for Grant Writing
- **Proposal templates**: Proven frameworks for success
- **Persuasive language**: Make your case compelling
- **Budget narratives**: Explain funding needs clearly

**Try Rytr**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Grammarly: Professional Polish for Proposals

Grammarly ensures your grant proposals are error-free, clear, and professionally written.

### Grammarly for Grant Writing
- **Grammar perfection**: Submit flawless proposals
- **Clarity improvements**: Make complex ideas accessible
- **Tone adjustment**: Sound confident and persuasive

**Try Grammarly**: {{AFFILIATE_GRAMMARLY}}

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Grant Focus |
|------|----------|-------|-------------|

## Our Recommendations

- **Drafting**: Start with [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]
